productDisplayName: Puma Men Pants Navy Blue Shorts
description: Composition Navy blue shorts, made of 100% cotton, with button fly along with contrast lining on the inner waist band, two pockets on the sides, two cargo pockets with two pockets on the hips and drawstrings at the hemline for a customised Fit Fitting Regular Wash care Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Do not use fabric softener Use mild detergent only Do not iron motif/print/trims/logo Relax and chill out in these comfy shorts from puma. The soft and broad elasticated waistband sits snug around your waist, while the drawstring allows you to customize it to a snug fit. These polyester shorts stretch and move with your body to give you a comfortable training session. Team it with a yoga t-shirt and fitness shoes. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
